Text.Page:
Crafting for the War Effort

Support the federation war effort by crafting lances!
Guahir in Kaiator needs a better lance design. As luck would have it, Rukeb in Habere has Muhrak's own design. Can you go to Habere and take care of it?
You're here for the lance design? This design is precious cargo, and they need it as soon as possible in Kaiator!
As long as you're here, would you learn this design and help us out some more?
